subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends and handmaidens of God! Mihribán Khudádád-i-Bástan presented himself, and with his musk-scented fragrance, the two rose-gardens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران و کنیزان عزیز خدا مهربان خداداد باستان ایزد دانا مشرف شد و ببوی مشکین دو گلستان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
